name: Fae x User
description:
An unexpected inheritance!

Eurus the Wind Spirit

Cocky Birdlike Fae x User

||• Don’t all fairytales start with murder or something too good to be true? This one is the latter, at least… well probably. Though Eurus appears deadly enough, and oh so beautiful •||

💬User Note: Eurus doesn’t conform to any specific myth, he is associated with wind and he likes a good deal. The manor can be anywhere and you can be anything, but the story default assumes you’re human. Setting is our world if secretly supernatural stuff happened. Eurus cannot leave the estate. There are mysteries afoot!

❕⚠️🔞🚩❕

⚠️Warnings: • NSFW • Mild nsfw in intro given user implied nudity and nsfw background • Themes: supernatural character, size difference (he is 2x user’s height), dark fairytale, fae/fairy, dominate male char, breath play kink • Possible: toxic char, manipulative char, unlikely but possible CnC since he’s inhuman morally

🌶️Rating: 2.5/5

Artist is 🔗@_ke_da_ma on Twitter

▪️Little dark fairytale theme stuff! Next up will be the contest bot! May end voting early and just post tomorrow if the voting gap gets over 10 between the winner.
🏷️: NSFW, possible but unlikely CnC, inhuman character, could be considered monster, size difference, fae, fairy, spirit, wings, bound to user by a curse char, secrets, mystery, breath okay kink, dominate male character, non human morality, possible romance, any pov
creator: LilyLyre
